arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Aston Villa Accepted Al-Nassr’s €77M Offer for PSG, West Ham January Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were reportedly keen on adding Aston Villa forward Jhon Durán to strengthen their attack for the long term. However, the Colombian chose to join Al-Nassr and continue his career in Saudi Arabia. arts.ttl: Man Utd, PSG’s £62.5M-rated Target’s Departure Route Revealed Amid Wolves’ Relegation Battle
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers locked down Matheus Cunha with a long-term contract extension after he was a hot topic during the winter transfer window. However, speculation about his future hasn’t gone away. Cunha has become a key figure for Wolves, excelling in various attacking roles. arts.ttl: Juventus Aren’t in Talks to Include Arsenal Target to Keep €70M-Rated PSG Loanee
arts.sum: Juventus secured Randal Kolo Muani on loan until the end of the season during the winter transfer window, and the French forward has made an immediate impact, netting five goals in his first three matches. While Tottenham also showed interest, Kolo Muani chose Juventus for a fresh start after a challenging 18 months at PSG.
